questions.question: 平流層(stratosphere)的特性為何:
questions.question_en: A characteristic of the stratosphere is
questions.A_en: An overall decrease of temperature with an increase in altitude.
questions.B_en: A relatively even base altitude of approximately 35,000 feet
questions.C_en: Relatively small changes in temperature with an increase in altitude.

questions.question: 中緯度地區平均對流層(troposphere)的高度為:
questions.question_en: The average height of the troposphere in the middle latitude is

questions.question: 造成天氣變化的原因為何?
questions.question_en: The primary cause of all changes in the earth’s weather is
questions.A: 各地接收到的太陽能量不同所致
questions.A_en: variation of solar energy received by the Earth’s regions
questions.B_en: changes in air pressure over the Earth’s surface

questions.question: 如果1,350呎的氣溫是8°C, 依標準大氣之溫度變化 (standard (average) temperature lapse),結冰高度(freezing level)為何?
questions.question_en: If the air temperature is + 8 degree at an elevation of 1,350 feet and a standard (average) temperature lapse rate exists, what will be the approximate freezing level?

questions.question: 通常地面逆溫 (inversion)的成因:
questions.question_en: A common type of ground or surface based temperature inversion is that which is produced by
questions.A_en: warm air being lifted rapidly aloft in the vicinity of mountainous terrain.
questions.B: 冷空氣移動到暖空氣上方或暖空氣移動到的冷空氣下方
questions.B_en: the movement of colder air over warm air, or the movement of warm air under cold air.
questions.C: 夜間微風時地表輻射冷卻
questions.C_en: ground radiation on clear, cool nights when the wind is light.

questions.question: 地面為南風, 5000呎吹西南風 , 這樣的差異是:
questions.question_en: Winds at 5,000 ft AGL on a particular flight are southwesterly while most of the surface winds are southerly. this difference in direction is primarily due to
questions.A: 高度愈高處, 氣壓梯度力愈大
questions.A_en: a stronger pressure gradient at high altitudes.
questions.B_en: friction between the wind and the surface.
questions.C: 地表柯氏力(Coioslis force) 所致
questions.C_en: Stronger Coioslis force at the surface.

questions.question: 地面風與位於2,000呎高空風之間的關係是:
questions.question_en: What relationship exists between the winds at 2,000 feet above the surface and the surface winds?
questions.A: 兩者風向一樣,因地表摩擦力所致,地面風風速較小
questions.A_en: The winds at 2,000 ft and the surface winds flow in the same direction, but the surface winds are weaker due to friction.
questions.B: 2000呎高空風之風向平行等 壓線(isobars),地面風則是吹跨越等壓線,且風速較小
questions.B_en: The winds at 2,000 ft tend to parallel the isobars while the surface winds cross the isobars at an angle toward lower pressure and are weaker.
questions.C_en: The surface winds tend to veer to the right of the winds at 2,000 ft and are usually weaker.

questions.question: 在北半球，是那一種力造成風向偏右,轉變為平行等壓線(isobars):
questions.question_en: Which force, in the North Hemisphere, acts at a right angle to the wind and deflects it to the right until parallel to the isobars?

questions.question: "露點溫度"(dew point)的定義：
questions.question_en: To which meteorological condition does the term "dew point”refer?
questions.A: 定壓下使氣溫下降到空氣內的水汽飽和(saturated)時之溫度
questions.A_en: The temperature to which air must be cooled to become saturated.
questions.B: 水汽之凝結 (condensation)和蒸發(evaporation)速度相等時
questions.B_en: The temperature at which condensation and evaporation are equal.
questions.C: 當氣溫達到露點溫度時,就會形 成露水
questions.C_en: The temperature at which dew will always form.

questions.question: 空氣中的水汽含量由下列哪一項決定：
questions.question_en: The amount of water vapor which air can hold largely depends on
questions.C: 大氣的穩定度(stability of air)

questions.question: 大氣的穩定度由下列哪一項決定：
questions.question_en: Stability can be determined from which measurement of the atmosphere?
questions.B: 垂直大氣的溫度變化(Ambient lapse rate)

questions.question: 未飽和空氣(Unsaturated air )隨高度的(乾絕熱)溫度變化率為：
questions.question_en: Unsaturated air flowing up slope will cool at the rate of approximately (dry lapse rate)
questions.A: 每上升一千呎溫度下降3°C
questions.B: 每上升一千呎溫度下降2°C
questions.C: 每上升一千呎溫度下 降2.5°C

questions.question: 穩定(stable)而潮濕的空氣強制抬升, 通常會形成:
questions.question_en: What type of clouds will be formed if very stable moist air is forced up slope?
questions.C: 層狀雲(Stratified clouds)並有伴隨 極小的垂直運動
questions.C_en: Stratified clouds with little vertical development.

questions.question: 哪一種天氣型態造成積狀雲( cumuliform type clouds), 能見度好,陣雨,及明冰的積 冰(clear-type icing)?
questions.question_en: Which of the following combinations of weather producing variables would likely result in cumuliform type clouds, good visibility, rain showers and possible clear-type icing in clouds?
questions.A: 潮濕及不穩定的大氣及缺乏抬升運動
questions.A_en: Unstable, moist air, and no lifting mechanism.
questions.B: 乾燥及穩定的大氣及抬升運動
questions.B_en: Stable, dry air, and orographic lifting.
questions.C: 潮濕及 不穩定的大氣及抬升運動
questions.C_en: unstable, moist air, and orographic lifting.

questions.question: 雲依其高度與發展分為：
questions.question_en: What are the four families of clouds?
questions.B: 上升 氣流, 鋒面, 溫度下降及降水形成的雲
questions.B_en: Clouds formed by updrafts, front, cooling layers of air, and precipitation into warm air.
questions.C: 高雲族,中雲族,低雲族,直展雲族（vertical development）
questions.C_en: Height, middle, low, and those with extensive vertical development.

questions.question_en: A high cloud is composed mostly of

questions.question: 哪一種雲帶來的亂流最強：
questions.question_en: Which clouds have the greatest turbulence?

questions.question: 通常工業區比較容易有霧, 其主要原因是:
questions.question_en: Fog is usually prevalent in industrial areas because of
questions.B: 空氣中有較多燃燒產物之凝結核 (condensation nuclei)
questions.B_en: an abundance of condensation nuclei from combustion products.
questions.C: 工業污染造成氣溫上升
questions.C_en: increased temperature due to industrial heating.

questions.question: 哪一種天氣型態造成輻射霧( radiation fog):
questions.question_en: What situation is most conducive to the formation of radiation fog?
questions.A: 晴空靜風的夜間,地表上方空氣水汽充分
questions.A_en: Warm, moist air over low, flatted areas on clear calm night.
questions.B: 暖濕的熱帶空氣移動到較冷的海水面
questions.B_en: Moist, tropical air moving over cold, offshore water.
questions.C: 冷空氣移動到較暖的水域
questions.C_en: The movement of cold air over much warmer water.

questions.question: 不穩定(unstable)的冷空氣移動到暖水域,會造成:
questions.question_en: Which are characteristics of an unstable cold air mass moving over a warm surface?
questions.A: 積雲(Cumuliform clouds), 亂流,低能見度
questions.A_en: Cumuliform clouds, turbulence and poor visibility.
questions.B: 積雲(Cumuliform clouds）, 亂流, 能見度良好
questions.B_en: Cumuliform clouds, turbulence and good visibility.
questions.C: 層雲（Stratiform clouds）, 無亂流,低能見度
questions.C_en: Stratiform clouds, smooth air and poor visibility.

questions.question: 雷雨形成的原因:
questions.question_en: What are the requirements for the formation of a thunderstorm?
questions.A_en: A cumulus cloud with sufficient moisture.
questions.B: 充沛水汽,伴隨積雲且逆溫( inverted lapse rate)
questions.B_en: A cumulus cloud with sufficient moisture and an inverted lapse rate.
questions.C: 充 沛水汽之不穩定(unstable)及抬升運動
questions.C_en: Sufficient moisture, an unstable lapse rate, and a lifting action.

questions.question: 雷雨(thunderstorm)的成熟（mature）期的徵兆為:
questions.question_en: Which weather phenomenon signals the beginning of the mature of a thunderstorm?
questions.A_en: The start of rain at the surface.
questions.B_en: Growth rate of cloud is maximum.

questions.question: 雷雨(thunderstorm)的哪一個階段具明顯的下沖氣流（downdrafts）:
questions.question_en: During the life cycle of a thunderstorm, which stage is characterized predominately by downdrafts?

questions.question: 雷雨(thunderstorm)活動伴隨明顯下沖氣流（downdrafts）的成熟期( mature stage), 其特徵為:
questions.question_en: What is an indication that downdrafts have developed and the thunderstorm cell has entered the mature stage?
questions.A: 積雨雲頂有明顯的砧狀雲頂(anvil top)
questions.A_en: The anvil top has completed its development.
questions.B_en: Precipitation begins to fall from the cloud base.

questions.question: 風切(wind shear）的特性為：
questions.question_en: What is an important characteristic of wind shear?
questions.A: 大氣中有臭氣成份（zones）且有幅合現象（convergence)所致
questions.A_en: It is an atmospheric condition that is associated exclusively with zones of convergence.
questions.B: 柯氏力(Coioslis force)在高層及低層大氣不同所致
questions.B_en: The Coriolis phenomenon in both high- and low level air masses is the principal generating force.
questions.C: 伴隨低層大氣的逆溫(inversion),噴射氣流 （jet stream),及鋒面帶( frontal zone）的大氣現象
questions.C_en: It is an atmospheric condition that may be associated with a low-level temperature inversion, a jet stream, or a frontal zone.

questions.question: 精確進場時，風由尾風轉變成頭風，推力應如何調整以保持恆定的指示空速？
questions.question_en: When passing through an abrupt wind shear which involves a shift from a tailwind to a headwind, what power management would normally be required to maintain a constant indicated airspeed and ILS glide slope?
questions.A: 設較大的推力，進入風切區時增加推力，之後再減低推力
questions.A_en: Higher than normal power initially, followed by a further increase as the wind shear is encountered, then a decrease.
questions.B: 設較小的推力，進入 風切區時減低推力，之後再增加推力
questions.B_en: Lower than normal power initially, followed by a further decrease as the wind shear is encountered, then an increase.
questions.C: 設較大的推力，進入風切區時減低推力，之後 再增加推力
questions.C_en: Higher than normal power initially, followed by a decrease as the shear is encountered, then an increase.

questions.question: 爬升或下降時穿越逆溫層或風切區，飛行員應該要注意下例哪一種飛機性能的改變？
questions.question_en: When a climb or descent through an inversion or wind-shear zone is being performed, the pilot should be alert for which of the following change in airplane performance?
questions.A: 較高的爬升率和較低的下降率
questions.A_en: A fast rate of climb and a slow rate of descent.

questions.question: 根據下列 TAF，KBNA地面天氣狀況為何？METAR KBNA 211250Z 1/2SM R31/2700FT +SN BLSNFG VV008 00/M03 A2991 RMK RAE42SNB42
questions.question_en: What is meant by the entry in the remarks section of METAR surface report for KBNA? METAR KBNA 211250Z 33018KT 290V260 1/2SM R31/2700FT +SN BLSNFG VV008 00/M03 A2991 RMK RAE42SNB42
questions.B_en: Heavy blowing snow and fog on runway 31.
questions.C_en: Rain ended 42 past the hour, snow began 42 past the hour.

questions.question: TAF中出現"VRB",指風速在下列那一個範圍內

questions.question_en: When the visibility is greater than 6 SM on a TAF is expressed as

questions.question_en: What is the forecast wind at 180OZ in the following TAF? 00000KT 1/2SM RAFG OVC005=

questions.question: 何時SIGMET會發佈？
questions.question_en: Which meteorological condition is issued in the form of a SIGMET (WS)?
questions.A: 大範圍沙塵暴造成能見度低於3哩
questions.A_en: Widespread sand or dust storms lowering visibility to less than 3 miles.
questions.C_en: Sustained winds of 30 knots or greater at the surface.

questions.question: AIRMETS最大的預測時間為何?
questions.question_en: What is the maximum forecast period for AIRMETS?

questions.question: AIRMETs何時會重新發佈？
questions.question_en: AIRMETs are issued on a scheduled basis every
questions.B_en: 15 minutes until the Al RMET is canceled.

questions.question: 如何讓空氣內水汽增加?
questions.question_en: Moisture is added to a parcel of air by

questions.question: 在北半球，風向受到哪一種影響：
questions.question_en: In the Northern Hemisphere, the wind is deflected to the
questions.A: 受柯氏力(Coioslis force)影響偏向右
questions.C: 受柯氏力 (Coioslis force)影響偏向左

questions.question: 下列敘述何者正確:
questions.question_en: Which is true with respect to a high- or low- pressure system?
questions.A: 高壓或脊線(ridge)為上升氣流形成的
questions.A_en: A high-pressure area or ridge is an area of rising air.
questions.B: 低壓或槽線(trough)為下降氣流形成的
questions.B_en: A low-pressure area or trough is an area of descending air.
questions.C: 高壓或脊線(ridge)為下降氣流形成的
questions.C_en: A high-pressure area or ridge is an area of descending air.

questions.question: 如果你在北半球飛向低氣壓:
questions.question_en: When flying into a low-pressure area in the Northern Hemisphere, the wind direction and velocity will be from the
questions.A: 風由左邊來,且風速會減弱.
questions.B: 風由左邊來,且風速會增加.
questions.C: 風由右邊來,且風速 會減弱.

questions.question: 在北半球，越野飛行(cross-country)如果有左側風表示:
questions.question_en: While flying cross-country, in the Northern Hemisphere, you experience a continuous left crosswind which is associated with a major wind system. this indicates that you
questions.A_en: are flying toward an area of generally unfavorable weather conditions.
questions.B_en: have flown from an area of unfavorable weather conditions.
questions.C: 缺乏氣壓資料, 無法判斷天氣好 壞
questions.C_en: cannot determine weather conditions without knowing pressure changes.

questions.question: 哪一種力阻礙風由高壓吹向低壓:
questions.question_en: What prevents air from flowing directly from high-pressure areas to low-pressure areas?

questions.question: 在北半球，低氣壓的特性為:
questions.question_en: The wind system associated with a low-pressure area in the Northern Hemisphere is
questions.A: 反氣旋式氣流而且伴隨下降的空氣
questions.A_en: an anticyclone and is caused by descending cold air.
questions.B: 受柯氏力影響為氣旋式流動
questions.B_en: a cyclone and is caused by Coriolis force.
questions.C: 受柯氏力影 響為反氣旋式流動
questions.C_en: an anticyclone and is caused by Coriolis force.

questions.question: 對流層頂的特性為:
questions.question_en: Which feature is associated with the tropopause?
questions.A: 對流層頂高度全球一致
questions.B_en: Abrupt change in temperature lapse rate.
questions.C_en: Absolute upper limit of cloud formation.

questions.question: 標準大氣於 一萬呎時的溫度是:
questions.question_en: What is the standard temperature at 10,000 feet?

questions.question: 標準大氣於海平面的溫度及氣壓是:
questions.question_en: What are the standard temperature and pressure values for sea level?

questions.question: 標準大氣於 兩萬呎時的溫度是:
questions.question_en: What is the standard temperature at 20,000 feet?

questions.question: 天空出現莢狀高積雲（ lenticular altocumulus ）表示：
questions.question_en: The presence of standing lenticular altocumulus clouds is a good indication of
questions.A_en: lenticular ice formation in calm air.

questions.question: 哪一種天氣型態造成地面逆溫（inversion）:
questions.question_en: Which conditions are favorable for the formation of a surface based temperature inversion?
questions.A: 夜間且天空晴朗,微風或靜風造成的
questions.A_en: Clear, cool nights with calm or light wind.
questions.B: 地表加熱後快速的傳送到不穩定大氣造成 的
questions.B_en: Area of unstable air rapidly transferring heat from the surface.
questions.C: 大範圍的積雲且雲底的高度一致
questions.C_en: Broad areas of cumulus clouds with smooth, level bases at the same altitude.

questions.question: 哪一種關於平流霧（advection fog）的敘述正確:
questions.question_en: With respect to advection fog, which statement is true?
questions.A_en: It is slow to develop, and dissipates quite rapidly.
questions.B: 只在夜間或日出時形成的
questions.B_en: It forms almost exclusively at night or near daybreak.
questions.C: 無論白天或夜間都有可能形 成而且比輻射霧（ radiation fog）持續的時間久
questions.C_en: It can appear suddenly during day or night, and it is more persistent than radiation fog.

questions.question: 決定天空中形成層雲(stratiform)或積雲(cumuliform)的主要原因是
questions.question_en: The formation of either predominantly stratiform or predominantly cumuliform clouds is dependent upon the
questions.B_en: stability of the air being lifted.
questions.C_en: temperature of the air being lifted.

questions.question: 有關對流(convective circulation)形成的原因為何?
questions.question_en: Which is true regarding the development of convective circulation?
questions.A: 冷空氣下降強,導致熱空氣上升
questions.A_en: Cool air must sink to force the warm air upward.
questions.B: 熱空氣因其密度較小而上升
questions.B_en: Warm air is less dense and rises on its own accord.
questions.C: 地面熱空氣較 冷空氣多, 且因熱空氣密度較小產生上升運動
questions.C_en: Warmer air covers a larger surface area than the cool air; therefore, the warmer air is less dense and rises.

questions.question: 雷雨的"積雲階段(cumulus stage)",其特性為何:
questions.question_en: What feature is normally associated with the cumulus stage of a thunderstorm?
questions.C_en: Beginning of rain at the surface.

questions.question: 哪一種危害性天氣夾帶強風, 冰雹(hail)及龍捲風(tornadoes)?
questions.question_en: The most severe weather conditions, such as destructive winds, heavy hail, and tornadoes, are generally associated with
questions.A_en: slow-moving warm fronts which slope above the tropopause.
questions.C: 快速移動的囚錮鋒 （occluded fronts）

questions.question: 雷雨產生的亂流發生位置為何 ?
questions.question_en: Of the following, turbulence associated with thunderstorms?
questions.A: 亂流可以延伸至雷雨雲外 50 哩範圍內
questions.A_en: outside the clouds, shear turbulence can be encountered 50 miles laterally from a severe storm.
questions.B: 亂流只有風發生在積雨雲底及水平方向5 哩範圍內
questions.B_en: Shear turbulence is encountered only inside cumulonimbus clouds or within a 5-mile radius of them.
questions.C: 亂流可以延伸至雷雨雲外20哩範圍內
questions.C_en: Outside the cloud, shear turbulence can be encountered 20 miles laterally from a severe storm.

questions.question_en: Refer to the e following METAR report: KTUS … 08004KT 4SM HZ ….. 26/04 A2995 RMK RAE36 At approximately what altitude AGL should bases of convective-type cumuliform clouds be expected?

questions.question: 地面天氣圖（Surface Analysis Chart)上相等的海平面氣壓值（sea level pressure） 的連出來的線稱為:
questions.question_en: On a Surface Analysis Chart, the solid lines that depict sea level pressure patterns are called
On a Surface Analysis Chart, close spacing of the isobars indicates

questions.question: TAF 中 "P6SM" 表示,能見度大於:
questions.question_en: The visibility entry in a Terminal Aerodrome Forecast (TAF) of P6SM implies that the prevailing visibility is expected to be greater than

questions.question: 哪一種天氣資料可以提供落地時機場的天氣資料?
questions.question_en: Which primary source contains information regarding the expected weather at the destination airport at the ETA?
questions.A: 低層大氣顯著危害天氣圖（Low-level Prog Chart）
questions.B: 雷達天氣圖（Radar Summary and weather depiction charts）
questions.B_en: Radar Summary and weather depiction charts.

questions.question: "VC"表示機場附近的天氣資料,其範圍是?
questions.question_en: Weather conditions expected to occur in the vicinity of the airport, but not at the airport, are denoted by the letters “VC”. When VC appears in a terminal aerodrome forecast, it covers a geographical area of
questions.A: 機場附近8到16公里的範圍
questions.A_en: a 8 to 16 status kilometer radius from the airport.
questions.B: 機場中心至其附近8公里的範圍
questions.B_en: a 8-kilometer radius of the center of a runway complex.
questions.C: 機場附近16公里 以外的範圍
questions.C_en: 16 kilometers of the station originating the forecast.

questions.question_en: According the METAR: RCTP 120230Z 25017KT 8000 -SHRA OVC090 27/24 Q0995= The wind speed at 12/0230Z is:

questions.question: 根據下列 METAR,12日0230Z 能見度為何? FEW012 BKN025 OVC090 27/24 Q0995 TEMPO 1500 SHRA=

questions.C_en: 1012 mb BKN025 FEW012 BKN025 FEW012 BKN025

questions.question: 所有天氣的自然變化過程(physical process), 都是來自於，或是都會伴隨著產生
questions.question_en: Every physical process of weather is accompanied by, or is the result of , a

questions.question: 造成各個氣象觀測站間高度表撥定值(QNH)不同的原因為何
questions.question_en: What causes variations in altimeter settings between weather reporting points?
questions.A_en: Unequal heating of the Earth's surface.

questions.question: 離地表5000呎高度的風向是西南風，但地表的風向是南風。此一風向差異的最主要原因 是
questions.question_en: The wind at 5,000 feet AGL is southwesterly while the surface wind is southerly. this difference in direction is primarily due to
questions.A: 高高度的壓差梯度較大
questions.A_en: stronger pressure graident at higher altitudes.
questions.B_en: friction between the wind and the surface.
questions.C_en: stronger Coriolis force at the surface.

questions.question: 雷雨的生成需要些什麼條件？

questions.A: 濕度大、上升力(lifting force)以及不穩定的狀況

questions.B: 濕度大、溫度高以及積雲 (cumulus clouds)
questions.B_en: High humidity, high temperature, and cumulus clouds.
questions.C: 上升力(lifting force)、潮濕的空氣以及大量覆蓋的雲 (extensive cloud cover)
questions.C_en: Lifting force, moist air, and extensive cloud cover.

questions.A: 溫度與露點溫度(dewpoint)的差距小

questions.A: 積雲(cumulus clouds)且溫度低於零度

questions.question: 在地表有冰霰(ice pellet)，則證明

questions.question: 一種狀如杏仁或鏡片狀的雲，看來似乎是靜止的，但其中可能存有超過50節風的雲名為
questions.question_en: An almond or lens-shaped cloud which appears stationary, but which may contain winds of 50 knots or more, is referred to as
questions.A: 不活躍的鋒面雲(inactive frontal cloud)

questions.question: 一種在會出現在山岳波(mountain wave)頂端，靜止的鏡片狀雲名為

questions.question: 當有超過40節的風在下列何狀況下即應預期會有山岳波亂流(mountain wave turbulence)
questions.question_en: Possible mountain wave turbulence could be anticipated when winds of 40 knots or greater blow
questions.A: 當風橫向吹過山脊，且氣流穩定時
questions.A_en: across a mountain ridge, and the air is stable.
questions.B: 當風向下吹進山谷，且氣流不穩定時
questions.B_en: down a mountain valley, and the air is unstable.
questions.C: 當 風的吹向與山嶺平行，且氣流穩定時
questions.C_en: parallele to a mountain peak, and the air is stable.

questions.question: 風切(wind shear)會發生在何處？
questions.question_en: Where does wind shear occur?
questions.C: 在所有高度的任何方向
questions.C_en: At all altitudes, in all directions.

questions.question: 當地表以上2,000到4,000英呎高度的風速至少有多大時，飛行員即可預期在逆溫 (temperature inversion)層中會有風切區(wind-shear zone)
questions.question_en: A pilot can expect a wind-shear zone in a temperature inversion whenever the windspeed at 2,000 to 4,000 feet above the surface is at least

questions.question: 下列何情況中預期會有嚴重的風切？
questions.question_en: When may hazardous wind shear be expected?
questions.A: 當穩定的空氣越過山時，會以層流的方式形成莢狀雲(lenticular cloud)
questions.A_en: When stable air crosses a mountain barrier where it tends to flow in layers forming lenticular clouds.
questions.B: 在低 空逆溫(temperature inversion),層、鋒面區域(frontal zones)及晴空亂流(clear air turbulence)區
questions.B_en: In areas of low-level temperature inversion, frontal zones, and clear air turbulence.
questions.C: 在鋒面過境後形成層積雲(stratocumulus)顯示有機械混合層 (mechanical mixing)
questions.C_en: Following frontal passage when stratocumulus clouds form indicating mechanical mixing.

questions.question: 若溫度與露點溫度間的差距很小且該差距在持續縮小中，在華氏62度的情形下，最容易 生成哪種型態的天氣
questions.question_en: If the temperature/ dewpoint spread is small and decreasing, and the temperature is 62oF, what type of weather is most likely to develop?

questions.question: 『露點溫度』代表什麼意思？
questions.question_en: What is meant by the term "dewpoint"?
questions.A: 在該溫度下凝結(condensation)率等於蒸發(evaporation)率
questions.A_en: The temperature at which condensation and evaporation are equal.
questions.B: 在該溫度下一定 會生成露(dew)
questions.B_en: The temperature at which dew will always form.
questions.C: 將空氣降溫，降到使該空氣達到飽和(saturated)時的溫度
questions.C_en: The tempreatuer to which air must be cooled to become saturated.

questions.question: 空氣中能夠含水蒸氣量(water vapor)的多寡取決於

questions.question: 什麼情形下會生成霜？
questions.question_en: Which conditions result in the formation of frost?
questions.A: 當小滴的水汽(moisture)落在溫度在冰點(freezing)或低於冰點的表面上
questions.A_en: The temperature of the collecting suface is at or below freezing when small droplets of moisture fall on the surface.
questions.B: 當小 滴的水汽(moisture)所落下的表面，其溫度等於或低於其周邊鄰近空氣的露點溫度，且 該露點溫度(dewpoint)低於冰點
questions.B_en: The temperature of the collecting suface is at or below the dewpoint of the adjacent air and the dewpoint is below freezing.
questions.C: 當小滴的水汽(moisture)所落下的表面，其周邊鄰 近空氣的溫度等於或低於低於冰點
questions.C_en: The temperature of the surrounding air is at or below freezing when small drops of moisture fall on the collecting surface.

questions.question: 在哪種情況下最容易形成平流霧 (advection fog) ？

questions.A: 山坡迎風面上的一個溫暖潮濕的氣團 (air mass)

questions.B: 在冬天裡一個氣團從海岸移向 內陸
questions.B_en: An air mass moving inland from the coast in winter.
questions.C: 一股微風將較冷的空氣吹到海上
questions.C_en: A light breeze blowing colder air out to sea.

questions.question: 哪種情況最易導致輻射霧 (radiation fog) 的生成？
questions.question_en: What situation is most conductiive to the formation of radiation fog?
questions.A: 在清澈無風的夜裡，溫暖潮濕的空氣處於低平地區的上空
questions.A_en: Warm, moist air over low, flatland areas on clear, calm nights.
questions.B: 潮濕的熱帶空氣移到 冷的近海水域 (offshore water) 之上
questions.B_en: Moist, tropical air moving over cold, offshore water.
questions.C: 冷空氣移到較暖的空氣之上
questions.C_en: The movement of cold air over much warmer water.

questions.question: 何種霧需要有風才會生成？

questions.C: 平流霧 (advection fog)及上坡霧 (upslope fog)
